summary: Tested code quality refactoring changes (iteration 41). Found and FIXED 3 critical 'i is not defined' bugs in CaseDetail.js, LegalChat.js, and NextActionsPanel.js - same pattern as Dashboard.js bug from iteration 40. Also fixed missing sanitizeHtml import in Landing.js. All pages now load correctly without runtime errors.

critical_bugs.root_cause: In caseLaw.map() callback, the index variable was not defined but 'i' was used for borderBottom condition
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Changed caseLaw.map((cl) => to caseLaw.map((cl, clIdx) => and 'i < caseLaw.length - 1' to 'clIdx < caseLaw.length - 1'

critical_bugs.root_cause: In questions.map() callback, data-testid used undefined 'i' variable
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Changed questions.map((q) => to questions.map((q, qIdx) => and data-testid={`suggested-q-${i}`} to data-testid={`suggested-q-${qIdx}`}

critical_bugs.root_cause: In steps.map() callback, the step number display used undefined 'i' instead of 'sIdx'
sanitizeHtml function was used but not imported

features_verified.dashboard_loads: PASS - Cases list, risk score, findings, battle preview, outcome predictor, score history all render
features_verified.case_detail_page: PASS - All sections render including Score History chart, Next Actions with numbered steps, James Analysis
features_verified.document_library: PASS - Browse and Generate modes work
features_verified.legal_chat: PASS - Chat interface loads, suggested questions render with correct data-testid
features_verified.landing_page: PASS - All sections render (categories, howItWorks, lawyers, reviews, FAQ)
features_verified.jurisdiction_switching: PASS - US/BE switching works, onboarding modal appears on switch

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: CaseDetail.js line 497 - undefined 'i' in caseLaw.map() borderBottom condition
FIXED: LegalChat.js line 211 - undefined 'i' in questions.map() data-testid
FIXED: NextActionsPanel.js line 61 - undefined 'i' in steps.map() step number display
Minor: Signup.js has eslint warning for missing 'clearError' dependency in useEffect - not critical
seed_data_creation: Fixed belgium@jasper.legal user jurisdiction from US to BE
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring tested and fixed. Found 4 bugs (3 'i is not defined' errors + 1 missing import) - all fixed. Same pattern as Dashboard.js bug from iteration 40 where array index variable renaming was incomplete. All pages now load correctly. Backend helper function extraction (_build_belgian_analysis_result, _create_session_response, etc.) verified working.

reproduction_steps: 2. Navigate to CaseDetail page with caseLaw data, or LegalChat page, or any page with NextActionsPanel
3. Page crashes with 'i is not defined' error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: During the array index key refactoring task (replacing key={i} with content-based keys), the main agent renamed the index variable from 'i' to descriptive names (clIdx, qIdx, sIdx) in .map() callbacks, but references to 'i' inside the callback bodies were not updated. This is the exact same pattern found in Dashboard.js in iteration 40.
affected_files: CaseDetail.js - caseLaw.map() borderBottom condition used 'i' instead of 'clIdx'
LegalChat.js - questions.map() data-testid used 'i' instead of 'qIdx'
NextActionsPanel.js - steps.map() step number display used 'i' instead of 'sIdx'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Changed all references from 'i' to the correct renamed index variable in each file
